thought.text: It seems I need to get an API key first. Let me try a different approach using a public weather website.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "curl -s \"https://wttr.in/Burbank,IL?format=j1\" | jq '.current_condition[0].temp_C'", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Get current temperature in Burbank, IL using wttr.in API"}
